description: A fully functional mini-app that implements a daily five-letter word-guessing puzzle with per-letter color feedback (correct position vs wrong position). Clear game-loop structure with a reusable pattern for word-based puzzle games, including handling user input, validating guesses, and rendering per-row feedback.
